Functions.Name: SetScalarParameterValue
Functions.Description: Set a MID scalar (float) parameter value

Functions.Name: K2_GetScalarParameterValue
Functions.Description: Get the current scalar (float) parameter value from an MID

Functions.Name: SetTextureParameterValue
Functions.Description: Set an MID texture parameter value

Functions.Name: K2_GetTextureParameterValue
Functions.Description: Get the current MID texture parameter value

Functions.Name: SetVectorParameterValue
Functions.Description: Set an MID vector parameter value

Functions.Name: K2_GetVectorParameterValue
Functions.Description: Get the current MID vector parameter value

Functions.Name: K2_InterpolateMaterialInstanceParams
Functions.Description:
Interpolates the scalar and vector parameters of this material instance based on two other material instances, and an alpha blending factor
	  The output is the object itself (this).
	  Supports the case SourceA==this || SourceB==this
	  Both material have to be from the same base material

Params.Name: SourceA
Params.Description: value that is used for Alpha=0, silently ignores the case if 0

Params.Name: SourceB
Params.Description: value that is used for Alpha=1, silently ignores the case if 0

Params.Name: Alpha
Params.Description: usually in the range 0..1, values outside the range extrapolate

Functions.Name: K2_CopyMaterialInstanceParameters
Functions.Description:
Copies over parameters given a material interface (copy each instance following the hierarchy)
	  Very slow implementation, avoid using at runtime. Hopefully we can replace ity later with something like CopyInterpParameters()
	  The output is the object itself (this).

Functions.Name: CopyInterpParameters
Functions.Description:
Copies over parameters given a material instance (only copy from the instance, not following the hierarchy)
	  much faster than K2_CopyMaterialInstanceParameters(),
	  The output is the object itself (this).

Functions.Name: CopyParameterOverrides
Functions.Description:
Copy parameter values from another material instance. This will copy only
	  parameters explicitly overridden in that material instance!!
